final:
module shift_register(
    input obf_clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] q
);

always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 16'b0;
    end else if (load) begin
        q <= data_in;
    end else begin
        q <= {1'b0, q[15:1]}; // Shift right and fill MSB with 0
    end
end

endmodule
